name: AddProcessData
description: Adds metadata to the current rendering process. This data can be used by other tokens or within the same template. Returns an empty string.
signature: public IEncodedString AddProcessData(String metaType, String metaValue)

parameters.name: metaType
parameters.description: The key or type of the metadata.

parameters.name: metaValue
parameters.description: The value of the metadata.

name: AddPreProcessData
description: Adds metadata to a specific cache list before the Razor template is rendered. This allows module code to use this data (e.g., for database queries) before rendering. It requires a unique template name and module ID to create a specific cache key.
signature: public IEncodedString AddPreProcessData(String metaKey, String metaValue, String templateFullName, String moduleId)

parameters.name: metaKey
parameters.description: The key for the metadata.

parameters.name: metaValue
parameters.description: The value of the metadata.

parameters.name: templateFullName
parameters.description: The unique cache key for the template, typically in the format '{theme}.{templatename}.{templateExtension}'.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: The module ID to identify the specific module instance.

name: AddCssLinkHeader
description: Generates a <link> tag to include a CSS file in the HTML header.
signature: public IEncodedString AddCssLinkHeader(string cssRelPath)

parameters.name: cssRelPath
parameters.description: The relative path to the CSS file.

name: AddJsScriptHeader
description: Generates a <script> tag to include a JavaScript file in the HTML header.
signature: public IEncodedString AddJsScriptHeader(string jsRelPath)

parameters.name: jsRelPath
parameters.description: The relative path to the JavaScript file.

name: HiddenField
description: Renders a hidden input field bound to a SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString HiddenField(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value if the field is empty.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: TextBox
description: Renders a text input field bound to a SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString TextBox(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "", string type = "text")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value if the field is empty.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The input type (e.g., 'text', 'password', 'email').

name: TextBoxDate
description: Renders a date input field (type='date') bound to a SimplisityInfo data model. The value is formatted as 'yyyy-MM-dd'.
signature: public IEncodedString TextBoxDate(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the date field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default date value if the field is empty.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: TextArea
description: Renders a textarea field bound to a SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString TextArea(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default value if the field is empty.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: CheckBox
description: Renders a single checkbox with a label, bound to a boolean value in a SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString CheckBox(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String text, String attributes = "", Boolean defaultValue = false, bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the boolean field.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The label text for the checkbox.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default checked state.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: CheckBoxList
description: Renders a list of checkboxes from a dictionary or comma-separated strings. Each checkbox corresponds to a sub-node in the SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString CheckBoxList(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, Dictionary<string, string> dataDictionary, string attributes = "", bool defaultValue = false, bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The base XPath for the list data.

parameters.name: dataDictionary
parameters.description: A dictionary of value-text pairs for the checkboxes.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the container div.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default checked state for each item.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: RadioButtonList
description: Renders a list of radio buttons from a dictionary or comma-separated strings, bound to a single field in the SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString RadioButtonList(SimplisityInfo info, string xpath, Dictionary<string, string> dataDictionary, string attributes = "", string defaultValue = "", string labelattributes = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "", string inputclass = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: dataDictionary
parameters.description: A dictionary of value-text pairs for the radio buttons.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the container div.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default selected value.

parameters.name: labelattributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the labels.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

parameters.name: inputclass
parameters.description: CSS class for the input elements.

name: DropDownList
description: Renders a dropdown list (select) from a dictionary or comma-separated strings, bound to a single field in the SimplisityInfo data model.
signature: public IEncodedString DropDownList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, Dictionary<string, string> dataDictionary, String attributes = "", String defaultValue = "", bool localized = false, int row = 0, string listname = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the data field.

parameters.name: dataDictionary
parameters.description: A dictionary of value-text pairs for the options.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: defaultValue
parameters.description: The default selected value.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Row index for list data.

parameters.name: listname
parameters.description: List name for creating unique IDs.

name: SortableListIndex
description: Outputs hidden fields required for a sortable list to correctly process the sort order. This includes a unique item reference and the current row index.
signature: public IEncodedString SortableListIndex(SimplisityInfo info, int row)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model for the list item.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: The current row index.

name: EmailOf
description: Formats an email address from the data model as a 'mailto:' link.
signature: public IEncodedString EmailOf(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, string subject = "", string visibleText = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the email address field.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The email subject line.

parameters.name: visibleText
parameters.description: The visible text for the link. If empty, the email address is used.

name: HtmlOf
description: HTML-decodes a string from the data model or a direct string, rendering it as raw HTML.
signature: public IEncodedString HtmlOf(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the HTML content.

name: DateOf
description: Formats a date from the data model or a DateTime object into a string using a specific culture and format.
signature: public IEncodedString DateOf(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String cultureCode, String format = "d")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the date field.

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code for formatting (e.g., 'en-US', 'fr-FR').

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The date format string (e.g., 'd', 'g', 'yyyy-MM-dd').

name: Succinct
description: Shortens a string to a specified length and appends '...' if it was truncated.
signature: public IEncodedString Succinct(string value, int size, bool showdots = true)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The string to shorten.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The maximum length of the returned string.

parameters.name: showdots
parameters.description: If true, appends '...' if the string is truncated.

name: BreakOf
description:
Converts newline characters in a string to
tags and HTML-encodes the content.
signature: public IEncodedString BreakOf(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the string field.

name: CheckBoxListOf
description: Displays a formatted list (ul/li) of the selected items from a checkbox list.
signature: public IEncodedString CheckBoxListOf(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String datavalue, String datatext, String attributes = "")

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The base XPath for the list data.

parameters.name: datavalue
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of checkbox values.

parameters.name: datatext
parameters.description: Comma-separated string of checkbox display texts.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the container ul element.

name: FileSelectList
description: Renders a dropdown list of files from a specified directory.
signature: public IEncodedString FileSelectList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String mappathRootFolder, String attributes = "", Boolean allowEmpty = true, bool localized = false)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the field for the selected filename.

parameters.name: mappathRootFolder
parameters.description: The physical path to the folder containing the files.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: allowEmpty
parameters.description: If true, includes an empty option in the list.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

name: FolderSelectList
description: Renders a dropdown list of subdirectories from a specified directory.
signature: public IEncodedString FolderSelectList(SimplisityInfo info, String xpath, String mappathRootFolder, String attributes = "", Boolean allowEmpty = true, bool localized = false)

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: The data model.

parameters.name: xpath
parameters.description: The XPath to the field for the selected folder name.

parameters.name: mappathRootFolder
parameters.description: The physical path to the root folder.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: HTML attributes for the select element.

parameters.name: allowEmpty
parameters.description: If true, includes an empty option in the list.

parameters.name: localized
parameters.description: If true, binds to the localized 'genxml/lang/' path.

name: SFields
description: Generates a 's-fields' HTML attribute containing a JSON object from a series of key-value pairs. This is used for client-side scripting with Simplisity.
signature: public IEncodedString SFields(params string[] sFields)

parameters.name: sFields
parameters.description: An even number of strings representing key-value pairs.

name: SecuritySiteKey
description: Renders a hidden element containing the current session's site key. This can be used for security validation in client-side calls.
signature: public IEncodedString SecuritySiteKey(SessionParams sessionParams)

parameters.name: sessionParams
parameters.description: The current session parameters object.
